lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗ ਪਰੰਗ ਕਤੀਫਿਆ ਪਹਿਰਹਿ ਧਰ ਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: rang parang kateefiaa pahireh dhar maaee |
lines.english: The wealthy wear beautiful silk robes of various colors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੜੑਿ ਕਾਇਆ ਸੀਗਾਰ ਬਹੁ ਭਾਂਤਿ ਬਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: garra kaaeaa seegaar bahu bhaant banaaee |
lines.english: The fortress of the body has been decorated and adorned in so many ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਖਾਣਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਭੋਗਣਾ ਗਰਬੈ ਗਰਬਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: dukh khaanaa dukh bhoganaa garabai garabaaee |
lines.english: But they eat in pain, and in pain they seek pleasure; they are very proud of their pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਚੇਤਿਓ ਅੰਤਿ ਲਏ ਛਡਾਈ ॥੨੪॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na chetio ant le chhaddaaee |24|
lines.english: O Nanak, the mortal does not even think of the Name, which shall deliver him in the end. ||24||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲ ਸੁਪੇਦ ਦੁਲੀਚਿਆ ਬਹੁ ਸਭਾ ਬਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: laal suped duleechiaa bahu sabhaa banaaee |
lines.english: They hold elegant and beautiful courts, on red and white carpets.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਸੁਖਿ ਸੁਤੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje sukh sutee sabad samaae |
lines.english: She sleeps in intuitive peace and poise, absorbed in the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਲਈ ਗਲਿ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape prabh mel lee gal laae |
lines.english: God hugs her close in His Embrace, and merges her into Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਏ ਜਿ ਭੰਨਿ ਘੜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: se kantth laae ji bhan gharraae |
lines.english: He hugs close in His Embrace those who shatter and reform their beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar naam vasiaa man aae |
lines.english: The Naam comes to abide in her mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਚੂਕੀ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dubidhaa chookee sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Duality is eradicated with intuitive ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਕਿਆ ਜਪੁ ਜਾਪਹਿ ਹੋਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinaee naam visaariaa kiaa jap jaapeh hor |
lines.english: Those who forget the Naam, the Name of the Lord - so what if they chant other chants?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੇ ਹੁਣਿ ਆਣਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jo dhur mile se hun aan milaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are predestined to meet Him, come and meet Him now. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਟਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਕੀਟ ਸੇ ਮੁਠੇ ਧੰਧੈ ਚੋਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bisattaa andar keett se mutthe dhandhai chor |
lines.english: They are maggots in manure, plundered by the thief of worldly entanglements.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਝੂਠੇ ਲਾਲਚ ਹੋਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam na veesarai jhootthe laalach hor |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, never forget the Naam; greed for anything else is false. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਚਿਤਵੈ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਹੀ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai har har chitavai doojaa nahee koee |
lines.english: Within their hearts, they dwell on the Lord, and nothing else at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਜਗਿ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: naam salaahan naam man asathir jag soee |
lines.english: Those who praise the Naam, and believe in the Naam, are eternally stable in this world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਮਿ ਰੋਮਿ ਹਰਿ ਉਚਰੈ ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: rom rom har ucharai khin khin har soee |
lines.english: With each and every hair, they chant the Lord's Name, each and every instant, the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਸਕਾਰਥਾ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਮਲੁ ਖੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh janam sakaarathaa niramal mal khoee |
lines.english: The birth of the Gurmukh is fruitful and certified; pure and unstained, his filth is washed away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੀਵਦਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਅਮਰਾ ਪਦੁ ਹੋਈ ॥੨੫॥
lines.translit: naanak jeevadaa purakh dhiaaeaa amaraa pad hoee |25|
lines.english: O Nanak, meditating on the Lord of eternal life, the status of immortality is obtained. ||25||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਬਹੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਹੋਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee naam visaariaa bahu karam kamaaveh hor |
lines.english: Those who forget the Naam and do other things,

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਤਿ ਸੁਹਾਵੜੀ ਆਕਾਸੁ ਸੁਹੰਦਾ ਜਪੰਦਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dharat suhaavarree aakaas suhandaa japandiaa har naau |
lines.english: The earth is beauteous, and the sky is lovely, chanting the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਬਧੇ ਮਾਰੀਅਹਿ ਜਿਉ ਸੰਨੑੀ ਉਪਰਿ ਚੋਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jam pur badhe maareeeh jiau sanaee upar chor |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, will be bound and gagged and beaten in the City of Death, like the thief caught red-handed. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਹੂਣਿਆ ਤਿਨੑ ਤਨ ਖਾਵਹਿ ਕਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vihooniaa tina tan khaaveh kaau |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who lack the Naam - their carcasses are eaten by the crows. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਬਾਹੁੜਿ ਜੋਨਿ ਨ ਆਵਨੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਹੋਹਿ ਨ ਬਿਨਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: oe baahurr jon na aavanee fir hohi na binaasaa |
lines.english: do not enter into reincarnation ever again; they shall never be destroyed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਨਿ ਭਾਉ ਕਰਿ ਨਿਜ ਮਹਲੀ ਵਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: naam salaahan bhaau kar nij mahalee vaasaa |
lines.english: Those who lovingly praise the Naam, and dwell in the mansion of the self deep within,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਉਤਰੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਗਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa rang kade na utarai guramukh paragaasaa |
lines.english: The color of the Lord's Love never fades away; the Gurmukhs are enlightened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਮੇਲਿਅਨੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਸਾ ॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: oe kirapaa kar kai melian naanak har paasaa |26|
lines.english: Granting His Grace, He unites them with Himself; O Nanak, the Lord keeps them by His side. ||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹੇ ਸਭ ਸਾਸ ਗਿਰਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: har setee rang rav rahe sabh saas giraasaa |
lines.english: They remain immersed and absorbed in the love of the Lord, with every breath and morsel of food.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਚਰੁ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਲਹਰੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਹੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jichar ihu man laharee vich hai haumai bahut ahankaar |
lines.english: As long as his mind is disturbed by waves, he is caught in ego and egotistical pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਾ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਵਈ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਖਪਿ ਖਪਿ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sevaa thaae na pavee tis kee khap khap hoe khuaar |
lines.english: His service is not accepted; worrying and worrying, he wastes away in misery.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੈ ਸਾਦੁ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਨਾਮਿ ਨ ਲਗੈ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabadai saad na aavee naam na lagai piaar |
lines.english: He does not find the taste of the Shabad, and he does not embrace love for the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਭਾਣਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਲਏ ਸਬਦੁ ਰਖੈ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: satigur kaa bhaanaa man le sabad rakhai ur dhaar |1|
lines.english: He accepts the Will of the True Guru, and enshrines the Shabad within his heart. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇਵਕੁ ਸੋਈ ਆਖੀਐ ਜੋ ਸਿਰੁ ਧਰੇ ਉਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: naanak sevak soee aakheeai jo sir dhare utaar |
lines.english: O Nanak, he alone is called a selfless servant, who cuts off his head, and offers it to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਲਏ ਆਪਤੁ ਗਵਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape bakhase mel le aapat gavaavai |
lines.english: The Lord Himself forgives, and takes away self-conceit, and unites the mortals with Himself.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜਪੁ ਤਪੁ ਸੇਵਾ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਜੋ ਖਸਮੈ ਭਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: so jap tap sevaa chaakaree jo khasamai bhaavai |
lines.english: That is chanting and meditation, work and selfless service, which is pleasing to our Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿਆ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਵੀਛੁੜੈ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: miliaa kade na veechhurrai jotee jot milaavai |
lines.english: United with the Lord, the mortal is never separated again; his light merges into the Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਸੋ ਬੁਝਸੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak gur parasaadee so bujhasee jis aap bujhaavai |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, by Guru's Grace, the mortal understands, when the Lord allows him to understand. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋ ਲੇਖੇ ਵਿਚਿ ਹੈ ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ko lekhe vich hai manamukh ahankaaree |
lines.english: All are held accountable, even the egotistical self-willed manmukhs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਚੇਤਈ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਮਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: har naam kade na chetee jamakaal sir maaree |
lines.english: They never even think of the Name of the Lord; the Messenger of Death shall hit them on their heads.
